home.heroSubtitle: Join Laila & Adam on a journey of sacred healing, meditation, and vibrational transformation.
home.guidesSubtitle: Two souls united in the sacred mission of healing and awakening
home.missionText: Our mission is to guide people toward holistic well-being, inner clarity, and spiritual awakening through Siddha Quantum Nexus practices, sound, and meditation. We envision a world where every individual can access their own power, align with their true purpose, and live a life of balance, peace, and joy.
home.lailaBio: Laila is a spiritual guide, yogi, and sound healer who channels divine energy through meditation, mantra, and transformational breathwork. She empowers individuals to awaken their intuition, open their hearts, and master the mind.
home.adamBio: Adam is a grounding presence and energy practitioner who supports the healing process through vibrational medicine, meditation, and sacred guidance. His work helps individuals realign with their life purpose and inner wisdom.
home.togetherQuote: Together, we create a sacred space where miracles happen and souls remember their divine nature.
home.offerSubtitle: Comprehensive tools and guidance for your spiritual journey
home.healingDesc: Experience profound energy healing and chakra balancing for deep transformation.

inner_peace.title: Inner Peace Path
inner_peace.description: A 21-day journey to find lasting tranquility through daily practices focused on calm and stress relief.

1.title: Finding Stillness
1.description: Begin your journey by connecting with the stillness within.
1.affirmation: I am at peace with myself and the world around me.
1.journalPrompt: What does inner peace mean to you?

2.title: Breath Awareness
2.description: Discover the calming power of conscious breathing.
2.affirmation: With each breath, I invite calmness and release worry.
2.journalPrompt: How does your breath affect your emotional state?

3.title: Releasing Tension
3.description: Learn to release physical and mental tension.
3.affirmation: I release what no longer serves me with love.
3.journalPrompt: Where do you hold tension in your body?

4.title: Present Moment
4.description: Find peace in moments of silence and solitude.
4.affirmation: In silence, I find my true self.
4.journalPrompt: What arises when you sit in silence?

5.title: Self-Compassion
5.description: Peace begins with how we treat ourselves. Today we cultivate deep self-compassion.
5.affirmation: I am worthy of love and kindness. I treat myself with the same compassion I offer others.
5.journalPrompt: What would you tell your younger self?

6.title: Grounding Presence
6.description: Ground yourself in the present moment.
6.affirmation: I am grounded, centered, and secure.

7.title: Peaceful Integration
7.description: Integrate your learnings into daily life.
7.affirmation: Peace flows through me in every moment.
7.journalPrompt: How will you maintain peace in daily life?

yourSacredSpace.title: Your Siddha Quantum Nexus Space
yourSacredSpace.description:
This app is a daily support space.
You don't need to learn anything or believe anything.
Just come, choose how you feel, and follow a short practice.
Over time your mind, sleep and emotions naturally reorganize.

howToUse.title: How to use this app

whatEachTabDoes.title: What each tab does
whatEachTabDoes.home: Home: Your daily step. Just follow it.
whatEachTabDoes.meditate: Meditate: Guided practices when you want quiet.
whatEachTabDoes.music: Music: Background sound for focus, sleep or calm.
whatEachTabDoes.soul: Soul: Receive deeper sessions (you can just rest).
whatEachTabDoes.library: Library: All tools in one place.
whatEachTabDoes.community: Community: Talk or listen to others (optional).

whatIsHappening.title: What is happening to me?
whatIsHappening.description:
Many people notice better sleep, calmer reactions, or emotional release after some days.
This is normal — just go gently and continue daily.

entertainment.title: Entertainment only
entertainment.body: All content, including meditations, frequencies, and spiritual guidance, is for entertainment and spiritual purposes only.

no_medical.title: No medical advice
no_medical.body: This app does not provide medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. Always seek the advice of your physician or other qualified health providers with any questions you may have regarding a medical condition.

not_substitute.title: Not a substitute
not_substitute.body: Never disregard professional medical advice or delay seeking it because of something you have read or experienced in this app. If you think you may have a medical emergency, contact your doctor or emergency services immediately.

soul.heroSubtitle: Experience energetic, emotional, mental, and spiritual transformation with Adam & Laila's Sacred Soul Vibration.
soul.moreAboutText: The 30 Days of Soul is designed to support your overall well-being and enhance multiple aspects of your life. Through this regular soul practice, we help you replenish your energy and vitality using divine energies of love, light, peace, and chi. This process may help promote balance, calm, and clarity, supporting body, mind, and spirit.
soul.healthText: Supports energetic balance, vitality, organ and immune system function, circulation, digestive and reproductive health, stress relief, and overall wellness.
soul.mentalText: Helps reduce stress, anxiety, and negative thought patterns while promoting emotional stability, self-love, and positive mindset.
soul.spiritualText: Supports awakening your spiritual potential, deeper meditation, higher vibration, wisdom, and connection with inner divinity.

shcCoin.title: The Sacred Healing Coin
shcCoin.description1: The Sacred Healing Coin is more than a symbol—it is a gentle companion on the journey back to yourself.
shcCoin.description2: Each coin carries the essence of freedom—freedom from old patterns, freedom to grow, and freedom to rise into the fullest version of who you are.
shcCoin.description3: Designed to inspire personal transformation, the Sacred Healing Coin also opens the path toward
shcCoin.description4: It represents alignment: when your energy is clear and your purpose awakened, abundance flows with greater ease.
shcCoin.symbolOfGrowth: A symbol of growth, a tool of empowerment, and a keeper of inner light.
shcCoin.phantomStep1: Download Phantom Wallet (mobile or browser extension)
shcCoin.phantomStep2: Create or import your wallet and add SOL (Solana)
shcCoin.phantomStep3: Open Phantom and tap the Swap icon
shcCoin.phantomStep4: Select SOL as the token you're swapping from
shcCoin.phantomStep5: Paste the SHC token address above or search "Sacred Healing Coin"
shcCoin.phantomStep6: Enter the amount and confirm the swap

shcCoin.cardStep2: Select your preferred provider (MoonPay, Coinbase, etc.)
shcCoin.cardStep3: Enter your card details and amount to purchase SOL
shcCoin.cardStep4: Once SOL arrives, use the Swap feature
shcCoin.cardStep5: Swap your SOL for SHC using the token address above
shcCoin.cardTip: Tip: Phantom's built-in "Buy" feature lets you purchase crypto directly with your card—no external exchange needed!

education.overviewP1: Knowledge is the foundation of all income streams. Our education hub provides you with courses, guides, and resources to master trading, investing, and building online income.
education.overviewP2: Learn at your own pace and apply your knowledge to any of our other income streams.
education.topic6: AI tools for productivity and income

aiIncome.title: AI Income Engine
aiIncome.whatIsIt: What is the AI Income Engine?
aiIncome.overviewP1: The AI Income Engine teaches you how to leverage artificial intelligence tools to create automated income streams. From content creation to digital products, AI can accelerate your path to financial freedom.
aiIncome.overviewP2: No technical skills required—we guide you step by step.
aiIncome.ideaContentDesc: Use ChatGPT and Claude to write articles, social media posts, and marketing copy for clients.
aiIncome.ideaArtDesc: Create and sell AI-generated art, logos, and graphics using Midjourney or DALL-E.
aiIncome.ideaAutomationDesc: Help businesses automate tasks using tools like Zapier and Make with AI integrations.
aiIncome.ideaCoursesDesc: Create educational content using AI assistance and sell it online.
aiIncome.ideaChatbotsDesc: Build and sell custom chatbots for businesses using no-code platforms.
aiIncome.step1Desc: Pick an AI skill that interests you (writing, design, automation, etc.)
aiIncome.step2Desc: Master 1-2 AI tools relevant to your chosen niche.
aiIncome.step3Desc: Create sample projects to showcase your AI-enhanced skills.
aiIncome.step4Desc: Use platforms like Fiverr, Upwork, or direct outreach to find clients.
aiIncome.step5Desc: Create templates and workflows to handle more clients efficiently.

shcCoin.overviewP1: SHC (Sacred Healing Coin) is our native utility token built on the Solana blockchain. It powers the ecosystem and rewards active community members.

bitcoinMining.description: Invest in a license that mines bitcoin through mining cards. The cards create bitcoin mining through an advanced computer algorithm that gives 14% back per card. It takes approximately 90 days until your 114% is mined.

bitcoinMining.futurePotentialDesc: Bitcoin is predicted to reach $1.5 million within 5 years. What you mine today could be worth 10x — holding your Bitcoin creates enormous future opportunity!
